title: Traditional Chinese Medicine 中医看诊

lines.en: Come in, sit down. What seems to be the problem?
lines.zh: 进来，请坐。有什么不舒服的？

lines.en: I have been coughing for two weeks.
Let me feel your pulse. Put your wrist here.
lines.zh: 我给你号个脉。把手腕放这里。

lines.en: Can you tell what is wrong from my pulse?
lines.zh: 从脉象能看出什么问题吗？

lines.en: Yes. You also need to show me your tongue.
lines.zh: 能。你还需要给我看看舌头。

lines.en: Good. I will prescribe some herbal medicine for you.
It can be bitter, but it works very well.
lines.zh: 可能有点苦，但效果很好。

lines.en: I will drink it. I want to get well soon.
lines.zh: 我会喝的。我想快点好起来。
